buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: bool search(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int left = 0; int right = n - 1; while (left <= n) { if (nums[left] == target) return true; left++; } return false; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public boolean search(int[] nums, int target) { int left = 0; int right = n - 1; while (left <= n) { if (nums[left] == target) return true; left++; } return false; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def search(self, nums: list[int], target: int) -> bool: left = 0; right = n - 1; while (left <= n): if (nums[left] == target): return True; left += 1; return False
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function solve(nums, target) { var left = 0; var right = n - 1; while (left <= n) { if (nums[left] == target) return true; left++; } return false; }

functionSignature.python: def search(self, nums: list[int], target: int) -> bool:

solutions.cpp: class Solution { public: bool search(vector<int>& nums, int target) { int left = 0; int right = nums.size() - 1; while (left <= right) { if (nums[left] == target) return true; if (nums[left] < target) left++; else right--; } return false; } };
solutions.java: public class Solution { public boolean search(int[] nums, int target) { int left = 0; int right = nums.length - 1; while (left <= right) { if (nums[left] == target) return true; if (nums[left] < target) left++; else right--; } return false; } }
solutions.python: class Solution: def search(self, nums: list[int], target: int) -> bool: left = 0; right = len(nums) - 1; while (left <= right): if (nums[left] == target): return True; if (nums[left] < target): left += 1; else: right -= 1; return False
solutions.javascript: function solve(nums, target) { var left = 0; var right = nums.length - 1; while (left <= right) { if (nums[left] == target) return true; if (nums[left] < target) left++; else right--; } return false; }
